University Shopping Store website built using HTML, CSS, JavaScript for the frontend and PHP for backend functionality, with a database for storing products and user data. It provides a simple e-commerce platform for students to browse and view products. This project improved my skills in full-stack web development and database integration.

Features smooth navigation, dark/light mode toggle, and scalable structure for future updates. Designed as a professional digital presence and practice ground for frontend development.

The main goal of this project was to create a stylish and functional restaurant website that helps Café Kulachi build a strong digital presence and attract more customers online. This project showcases responsive web design skills, frontend development, and creative restaurant branding with a modern and professional look.
A personal portfolio website showcasing my projects, skills, and frontend development journey with modern UI design and responsive layout.

Smart Attendance System is a responsive web project built using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Chart.js. It includes attendance tracking, dashboard analytics, RFID and QR scan simulation, search functionality, reports, dark/light mode, and form validation. The project is designed for CSE121 and demonstrates modern frontend development skills.

My GitHub profile repository showcases my skills in frontend web and app development, focusing on React.js, Node.js, and MongoDB. It includes links to my resume, social media, and portfolio projects. The profile also features stats and visualizations of my coding activities and GitHub engagement.

A responsive Netflix-inspired web application built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features a modern UI, responsive design, interactive FAQ section, and clean frontend architecture. Developed to strengthen frontend development skills and recreate a real-world streaming platform experience.
